use_codes.desc: REDUCTION OF RISK OF CARDIOVASCULAR DEATH, HOSPITALIZATION FOR HEART FAILURE, AND URGENT HEART FAILURE IN ADULTS WITH HEART FAILURE OR TYPE 2 DIABETES MELLITUS, CHRONIC KIDNEY DISEASE, AND OTHER CARDIOVASCULAR RISK FACTORS

indications.text:
INPEFA is indicated to reduce the risk of cardiovascular death, hospitalization for heart failure,
and urgent heart failure visit in adults with:
• heart failure or
• type 2 diabetes mellitus, chronic kidney disease, and other cardiovascular risk factors
